content: You believe the Clan Vendor should be changed? Tell us how.
Clan vendor costs,should be scaled to amount of members.Alot more at low membership scaled to large membership.,rotate surplus skins IE old skins and rotate weekly.
I agree! 200k clan for gear tams will take forever, upwards of a year if you do just dailies and then the 4 clan nests a week

referenced_message.author: n1trozipp3r
referenced_message.content:
You can donate clan resources for clan credits, even if all the facilities are fully upgraded, the games UI isnt very clear about this option.
Select the Shield in the clan resource donation screen and you can directly donate

content:
You can donate clan resources for clan credits, even if all the facilities are fully upgraded, the games UI isnt very clear about this option.
Select the Shield in the clan resource donation screen and you can directly donate
There is no cap on clan nests, you can grind them for 700 points for 1400 clan credits.
Plus the dailies you get, 28k a week. Its 3 weeks but that still means you're looking at 9 months to buy all the tams

referenced_message.author: n1trozipp3r
referenced_message.content:
my math may or may not be wrong
but a single weapon TAM costs 150k clan credits.
For every nest credit you donate, you receive 2X the clan credit.
so 75k nest credits for a single TAM, but nest credits you can earn are capped at 5k per run x 4 for each week.
So all in all, if I'm playing casually i can earn one TAM every month FYI

content: Getting only 600-800 credits per run after the first run when coupled with the trip back to the clan base and then back again to the next nest is tedious and not really an effective grind. It's basically just not worth doing if you are in a small clan. This directly impacts your ability to buy things at the clan vendor. If you could increase the amount you receive it also increases the clan credits earned, all of those things would help at the clan vendor. Once you purchase the TAMs and the cosmetic gear you really don't have anything else worth spending on which could be okay if that was the intention, but it will eventually mean people stop engaging with this mechanic entirely if they don't need crafting material.

my math may or may not be wrong
but a single weapon TAM costs 150k clan credits.
For every nest credit you donate, you receive 2X the clan credit.
so 75k nest credits for a single TAM, but nest credits you can earn are capped at 5k per run x 4 for each week.
So all in all, if I'm playing casually i can earn one TAM every month FYI

agree with this... at least more clannie can get more motivated to farm Clan Funds to get their TAM and also Clan levels to be top 1 clan in Leaderboard.
And also make purple chips and gold chips available on Clan Vendors as well..so we didnt have go to DZ all the time..and not all love going DZ all the time.

referenced_message.author: n1trozipp3r
referenced_message.content: Keep the clan vendor TAM refreshed for every month, and reduce the cost a little bit so someone can farm at least one TAM biweekly by playing the. game casually

content:
Don't refresh the TAM's, having them available to be farmed for Clan Credits would mean hardcore grinders would  powercreep the game more than it is, essentially making DZ a snooze fest by making unkillable medics more prevalent. People complain about Bulwarks, but have you seen those annoying Medics or Aegis builds? 

Make gold skill chips available according to your class in the clan shop. Add in superior metal components as well.
Keep the clan vendor TAM refreshed for every month, and reduce the cost a little bit so someone can farm at least one TAM biweekly by playing the. game casually

The only issue would be clan nests not giving you enough credits after doing weekly’s. It is an incredible grind to acquire all pieces in the vendor. I would also be nice if we could purchase recalibration materials.

When selling items, it would be great to have a better system for changing the count of items.  Either a slider or some kind of keypad.  This also applies to upgrading things like equipment pieces but I don't see a thread for that.
Please add a random module box once per week.
You could implement T2 crafting blueprints in the clan shop. Craftig would be more usefull.
A cheaper clan credit random TAM box that we can buy once a week from clan could be nice, like the exotic weapon one we can get with DZ credits but for other weapons or gear.
Maybe let us buy crafting materials with regular credits rather than clan credits if we are saving up for TAMs with clan credits?
Otherwise this is going to become a p2w
Yes: weekly reset with new stuff, or at least let us buy a weapon upgrade and a gear upgrade each week
Clan vendor are ok for me, maybe change the clan quest weekly to infinite instead of limited
Opting out means we can use it to buy Augments or skins
Change prices on the vendor so we can buy all crafting materials using what we can earn per week doing weekly and daily quests
You believe the Clan Vendor should be changed? Tell us how.
